name: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust 6.75% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares of Beneficial Interest
summary: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust 6.75% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares of Beneficial Interest represents a preferred equity interest in the REIT. These shares pay cumulative dividends and have liquidation preferences. PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust is based in Calabasas, California.
